'''chabasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynamist|dynamist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynamist|dynamist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chabasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæbæsæth|chæbæsæth]] || [[word:chæbæsæj|chæbæsæj]] || [[word:chæbæsæsh|chæbæsæsh]] || [[word:chæbæsæ|chæbæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chababasath|chababasath]] || [[word:chababasaj|chababasaj]] || [[word:chababasash|chababasash]] || [[word:chababasa|chababasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chabasath|chabasath]] || [[word:chabasaj|chabasaj]] || [[word:chabasash|chabasash]] || [[word:chabasa|chabasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chabafsath|chabafsath]] || [[word:chabafsaj|chabafsaj]] || [[word:chabafsash|chabafsash]] || [[word:chabafsaf|chabafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chabasatha|chabasatha]] || [[word:chabasaja|chabasaja]] || [[word:chabasasha|chabasasha]] || [[word:chabasaka|chabasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chabasath|chabasath]] || [[word:chabasaj|chabasaj]] || [[word:chabasash|chabasash]] || [[word:chabasa|chabasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chabasathal|chabasathal]] || [[word:chabasajal|chabasajal]] || [[word:chabasashal|chabasashal]] || [[word:chabasakal|chabasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chabasathatha|chabasathatha]] || [[word:chabasajaja|chabasajaja]] || [[word:chabasashasha|chabasashasha]] || [[word:chabasaka|chabasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chabasathan|chabasathan]] || [[word:chabasajan|chabasajan]] || [[word:chabasashan|chabasashan]] || [[word:chabasakan|chabasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chabasathaoro|chabasathaoro]] || [[word:chabasajaoro|chabasajaoro]] || [[word:chabasashaoro|chabasashaoro]] || [[word:chabasakaoro|chabasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
